Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 29 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 131 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 108 upvotes, 10 comments
  4. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 301 upvotes, 54 comments
  5. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 764 upvotes, 159 comments
  6. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 48 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 85 upvotes, 13 comments
  8. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 148 upvotes, 28 comments
  9. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 45 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 32 upvotes, 4 comments
  11. Demonstrating Real Time AV2 Decoding on Consumer Laptops 26 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 296 upvotes, 89 comments
  13. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 201 upvotes, 61 comments
  14. Components of a Coding Agent 238 upvotes, 76 comments
  15. Modern Generic SVGA driver for Windows 3.1 42 upvotes, 9 comments
  16. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 160 upvotes, 53 comments
  17. Dynamics of (Not) Being Perceived: Grief and Relief After Leaving Social Media 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 436 upvotes, 194 comments
  19. Unverified: What Practitioners Post About OCR, Agents, and Tables 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 648 upvotes, 311 comments
  21. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 36 upvotes, 10 comments
  22. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 159 upvotes, 78 comments
  24. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust 71 upvotes, 30 comments
  25. Talk like caveman 34 upvotes, 14 comments
  26. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 68 upvotes, 35 comments
  27. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 277 upvotes, 236 comments
  28. Electrical transformer manufacturing is throttling the electrified future 88 upvotes, 79 comments
  29. Elizabeth I's Manuscript of Pierre Boaistuau's Histoires Prodigieuses (1559) 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Ask HN: Is there any interest in a native Qt/C++ Discord client? 5 upvotes, 4 comments
